query: mixed color temperature sodium vapor orange streetlight clashing fluorescent night urban
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: mixed color temp — sodium vapor orange vs blue twilight, clashing artificial light sources, desolate urban night

response.objective_caption: A nighttime road scene with long horizontal streaks of white and yellow light traversing the lower portion of the frame, a bright amber street lamp glowing in the upper right corner, and scattered faint lights visible in the dark distance beyond the roadside.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A nighttime road scene rendered with intentional motion blur that stretches vehicle headlights into sweeping white and yellow light trails across the lower frame. A sodium vapor street lamp casts a sickly amber glow across the upper right, while exposure extremes push the light streaks into blown-out highlights and bury the surroundings in underexposed black shadows, creating an abstract nocturnal composition.
